violations.text: The presence of rats is not controlled as evidenced by burrows in dumpster area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024
Drinks and ice were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler and freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
Walk-in cooler door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in freezer has an accumulation of ice buildup. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024
The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. The dumpster area must be maintained clean to prevent harborage for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

The floors (Walk-in cooler) and walls (kitchen) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024
